statements.statement: I can identify with prompting how my actions make others feel happy or sad.
I can describe how my choices affect myself and my friends in familiar situations.
I can explain how my behaviors impact myself and others in different school and home contexts.
I can analyze how my decisions create positive or negative effects on myself and various groups.
I can evaluate the short-term and long-term consequences of my choices across multiple social contexts.
I can critically assess how my behaviors influence myself and others while considering diverse perspectives and values.
I can systematically reflect on my decision-making patterns and their complex effects across unfamiliar interpersonal situations.
